families.descriptionKo: 다섯 피로 축의 종합 지수와 표시 계약
신경계, 전신 근육, 국소 근육, 관절·건·충격, 동작·집중
조직별 상대 노출, 잔여 노출, 개인 보정과 표시
훈련 방법, 전이 분류, 부하와 catalogue
taxonomy, volume, 체중 운동과 시간 유지 운동
현재 공개 결정론적 자동 골자 생성 계약

knownGaps: M, S, C, P, D, I의 근거 강도는 load unit과 exercise별로 다르며 일부는 class-level proxy입니다.
일부 recovery class는 직접 조직별 human evidence가 아닌 class proxy를 사용합니다.
BasePrior artifacts and the pure adjustment evaluator are generated and validated but are not consumed by current UI or classification runtime.
PersonalBaseline, w_perUnit, FinalBoundary mixing, and relative-state classification remain future runtime work.
Scenario weights and experience coefficients are bounded product policy rather than measured population prevalence or biological capacity estimates.

phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Representative product prior, not a population norm.
phaseOneComponents.downstreamDependency: Future AdjustedPriorBaseline and FinalBoundary runtime integration

phaseOneComponents.output: AdjustedPrior boundaries, multiplier contributions, clamps, and provenance
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Does not estimate capacity and must never scale CurrentLoad or recovery.
phaseOneComponents.downstreamDependency: Future registry lookup and FinalBoundary runtime integration

phaseOneComponents.input: 50/65/75/90/105 kg production-ledger simulations with 75 kg reference
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Current production normalization yielded neutral beta for all profiles; this is not a biological irrelevance claim.

phaseOneComponents.output: Profile light/normal/hard intensity multipliers and diagnostics
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Habitual intensity is not current-session RPE or recent average RPE.

phaseOneComponents.input: Strength and racket-sport experience years plus profile relevance
phaseOneComponents.output: Bounded log contributions with POLICY_BOUNDED provenance
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Does not measure adaptation, injury risk, or recovery speed.

phaseOneComponents.output: Canonical registry and byte-identical app-ready JSON
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: The app-ready asset is intentionally not consumed by current runtime.

phaseOneComponents.input: Future per-unit valid history excluding the most recent seven calendar days
phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: No production runtime implementation exists in Phase 1.

phaseOneComponents.input: Future per-unit exposure sufficiency and inactivity handling

phaseOneComponents.knownLimitations: Current UI remains on the existing calibration behavior.
